channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Dow futures drop more than 400 points, oil surges after Trump declares Iran ceasefire 'over': Live updates
item.description: Oil prices added to the cautious tone after the U.S. started a "series of powerful strikes" against Iran on Tuesday evening.

item.title: Fed meeting minutes to show 'family fight' over rates. The squabble could drag on for a while
item.description: There have been few instances over the past 35 years or so when the Fed has only made one rate move, be it up or down.

item.title: Bezos' Blue Origin valued at $130 billion in first public fundraising round
item.description: Bezos' Blue Origin is raising outside capital in a round valuing the rocket company at $130 billion, sources told CNBC's Andrew Ross Sorkin.

item.title: Apple commits $30 billion to Broadcom for U.S. chipmaking push
item.description: Apple is expanding its Broadcom partnership in a $30 billion-plus chipmaking agreement, its largest American manufacturing commitment to date.

item.title: Here are Wednesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Netflix, SpaceX, Apple, Wynn, Block, Strategy, General Motors & more
item.description: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Wednesday.

item.title: Trump opposes Carroll getting $5 million damages verdict, cites last-ditch Supreme Court bid
item.description: Trump has been found liable in two trials for defaming E. Jean Carroll when he denied her claim he sexually abused her in a New York department store.

item.title: OpenAI to publicly release GPT-5.6 AI models, ending government-requested limits
item.description: OpenAI's chief rival, Anthropic, recently restored access to its latest models following a weeks-long clash with the government.

item.title: Mitch McConnell's health concerns grow amid 4th week in hospital with few details from aides
item.description: McConnell, the former longtime Senate leader who declined to seek an eighth term following a series of health scares, was admitted to the hospital on June 14.

item.title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
item.description: China said specific versions of Claude Code posed back-door vulnerabilities that could send sensitive information to a remote server.

item.title: Manhattan office leasing sees strongest gains in 20 years
item.description: During the second quarter, office leasing volumes were 31.3% above the 10-year average, according to a new report from Colliers.

item.title: Trump says he doesn't want anything to do with Spain: 'Cut off all trade'
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump slammed Spain for not contributing enough to NATO, as he attended the defense alliance summit in Turkey.

item.title: Trump pours cold water on NATO allies' united front
item.description: Trump criticized NATO allies over defense spending, attacked Spain and renewed his Greenland push during the alliance’s summit in Turkey.

item.title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Wednesday
item.description: Oil is surging, and Apple announces more investments into U.S. manufacturing.

item.title: Strait of Hormuz traffic won't return to normal until 2027 after latest setback, Kalshi traders predict
item.description: Speculators now see just a 44% chance that traffic flows return to normal by Dec. 1.

item.title: Weekly mortgage demand drops as rates remain stuck in a narrow range
item.description: Mortgage rates barely moved last week and haven't moved much in more than a month. That is resulting in lackluster mortgage demand.

item.title: General Motors has underperformed in 2026. JPMorgan sees a comeback
item.description: The investment bank raised its price target on the auto giant.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: United Airlines, Micron, Chevron & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

item.title: Trump doubles down on push for control over Greenland as Denmark vows to defend it
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump on Wednesday said the U.S. needs to control Greenland “for the protection of the world."

item.title: This former Apple executive is betting on Shenzhen, not Silicon Valley, to create the 'next Apple'
item.description: Startups building consumer electronics will have a better shot at becoming the next Apple in Shenzhen than in Silicon Valley, said Will Wang, CEO of China's smart-glasses startup.

item.title: Maine Senate race replacements circle amid pressure on Platner to drop out
item.description: Democrat Graham Platner has denied allegations of sexual assault leveled by Maine resident Jenny Racicot as calls for him to exit the pivotal race mount.

item.title: Netflix, Disney and YouTube interested in FIFA World Cup U.S. rights; package could reach $2 billion
item.description: FIFA has alerted media companies that English- and Spanish-language U.S. rights are likely to be sold together for 2030 and 2034, likely driving up the price.

item.title: How a Fed rate hike can affect mortgages — and affordable lenders to help you save
item.description: There could be three Fed rate hikes this year. Here's what that means for mortgages.

item.title: SambaNova hits $11 billion valuation as investors back Nvidia chip challengers
item.description: SambaNova is valued at $11 billion after fresh financing led by General Atlantic, as AI chip startups look to challenge Nvidia.

item.title: DeSantis-backed 'Stop WOKE' law meets appeals court block, teeing up possible Supreme Court fight
item.description: A Trump-appointed judge ruled against Gov. Ron DeSantis' "Stop WOKE Act," leaving Florida’s college speech limits blocked as a Supreme Court appeal looms.

item.title: A Berkshire-backed oil and gas producer is likely to benefit from strategy shift, Evercore ISI says
item.description: Occidental Petroleum is likely to gain from efforts to improve its capital efficiency and return value to shareholders, according to Evercore ISI.

item.title: Judge blocks DOJ subpoena for names of 2020 Fulton County, Georgia, election workers
item.description: President Donald Trump has focused on the ballot count in Fulton County, Georgia, to promote claims that he actually won the 2020 election

item.title: OpenAI secures U.S. regulatory green light for GPT-5.6 rollout, Axios report says
Meta enters AI image model race in bid to court advertisers and subscribers
item.description: Meta has announced Muse Image, its first AI model for image creation, as it seeks to attract creators and advertisers to its offerings.

item.title: Lawmakers probe growing use of Chinese AI models in U.S. companies
item.description: An ongoing House Committee investigation is probing the risks involved in the rise of AI built in China.

item.title: Samsung-backed AI chip firm Rebellions targets IPO in South Korea next year, CEO tells CNBC
item.description: Sunghyun Park, CEO of Rebellions, told CNBC that the company is leaning toward a listing on the KOSPI over the KOSDAQ.
